axioms.name: Provisionality of institutions
axioms.formula: Institution = Provisional cost device, not Arbiter

axioms.name: Editability operator
axioms.formula: Human := Apply(Edit) to C when Reversal(C) is detected

proposition.name: Responsibility as redesign capacity
proposition.formula: Responsibility := redesign(C) so that Cost(Close(Omega_rel)|C) >> Cost(Open(Omega_rel))
